title: Event is not reported by podman if filter contains image=<image>
body:
### Issue Description

I have started capturing podman events with certain filters. This filter includes type, image and event. Podman CLI should emit an appropriate events if it satisfies the given condition. As per observation events were not emitted if type=container event=died and image=<provided_image_name>

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Capture the podman event where filters are type=container event=died and image=<image>
2. Launch an interactive container from provide image <image>
3. Exit from container gracefully

### Describe the results you received

No events were reported by podman
```
# podman images
REPOSITORY                                                               TAG                           IMAGE ID      CREATED      SIZE
registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi-minimal                              8.9-1137                      28bcc8eb10d4  8 days ago   94.6 MB
# 
#  podman events --filter event=died --filter type=container --filter image=registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi-minimal:8.9-1137 &
[1] 3307071
# 
# 
# podman run -it --rm --entrypoint sleep registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi-minimal:8.9-1137 1
# podman run -it --rm --entrypoint sleep registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi-minimal:8.9-1137 1
# 
```

### Describe the results you expected

After exiting from container, podman should report an event

### Upstream Latest Release

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
The image filter is only used for image events, i.e. image pull image remove etc... not for container events such as died
